screen.gradlemc.title: GradleMC
screen.gradlemc.subtitle: Local modpack stability and adaptive diagnostics
screen.gradlemc.nav.title: Sections
screen.gradlemc.overview.description: GradleMC collects bounded local diagnostics for modpack stability, performance context, report exports, and practical troubleshooting.
screen.gradlemc.overview.open_note: Open this panel with /gradlemc gui or the configured GradleMC keybind.
screen.gradlemc.smart_ai.explain: Adaptive diagnostics use local rule-based scoring and adaptive thresholds. They do not use generative AI, cloud AI, online inference, telemetry, embeddings, or external ML services.
screen.gradlemc.settings.read_only: These settings are shown read-only. Edit gradlemc-common.toml or use supported commands where available.
screen.gradlemc.about.description: GradleMC provides local diagnostics, stability checks, adaptive insights, and lightweight reports for Minecraft modpacks.
screen.gradlemc.about.ai_note: Adaptive diagnostics in GradleMC means transparent local scoring and adaptive thresholds, not an LLM or generative AI system.
screen.gradlemc.command.gui: Open the GradleMC control and status panel.
screen.gradlemc.command.status: Show a compact status summary in chat.
screen.gradlemc.command.ai_status: Show adaptive diagnostics state for the current player.
screen.gradlemc.command.ai_reset: Reset adaptive diagnostics runtime data for the current player. Requires permission level 2.
command.gradlemc.gui.player_only: GradleMC GUI can only be opened by an in-game player.
